title: Reporting Requirements (Product, Annual, Supplemental)
description: Comprehensive coverage of FDA reporting requirements for laser products including Product Reports (21 CFR 1002.10), Supplemental Reports (21 CFR 1002.11), and Annual Reports (21 CFR 1002.13).
learning_objectives: Understand when a Product Report is required and what information must be included
Identify situations requiring Supplemental Reports for modified products
Know Annual Report deadlines and content requirements
Navigate the decision tree for selecting appropriate report types
Calculate reporting deadlines based on product introduction timelines
cfr_references: FORM FDA 3632 - Guide for Preparing Product Reports

interactive_components.name: Report Type Decision Tree
interactive_components.description: Interactive decision tree to determine which report type is required for different situations

interactive_components.name: Reporting Deadline Calculator
interactive_components.description: Tool for calculating report deadlines based on product introduction dates

interactive_components.name: Scenario-Based Compliance Exercise
interactive_components.description: Multi-step scenarios testing understanding of reporting requirements

interactive_components.name: Report Elements Checklist
interactive_components.description: Interactive checklist of required elements for each report type

questions.question: When must a Product Report be submitted to CDRH?
options: Within 30 days after introduction into commerce
Prior to introduction of products into commerce

questions.question: Which type of report is used for a new model in a previously reported model family?
Which changes require a Supplemental Report? (Select all that apply)
options: Changes affecting actual or potential emission
Changes resulting in decreased probability of detecting noncompliance

questions.question: When are Annual Reports due?
options: January 1 for the previous calendar year
September 1 for the 12 months ending June 30
December 31 for the current calendar year

questions.question: What is the estimated average reporting burden for completing FORM FDA 3632?
